title: jetpacking
description: now you can fly by creating a jetpack. dont forget to refuel by droping fuel on it in eq
body:
A straightforward Fabric mod that adds a functional Jetpack to the game. It’s designed to provide a balanced flight experience without overcomplicating your gameplay.

**Features**

1.     Functional Flight: Adds a wearable jetpack that allows you to fly and explore your world more easily.

2.     Survival Ready: Includes a dedicated crafting recipe, so you can make it yourself in survival mode.

3.     Custom Look: Features its own 3D model and textures to stand out from standard armor.

4.     Language Support: Fully translated into English.

**How to use**

Simply craft the jetpack using the recipe in the crafting table and equip it to start flying.****
